revision.comment: [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2021 July 6#Template:Britannica]] closed as no consensus ([[WP:XFDC#4.0.12|XFDcloser]])
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|" to "<noinclude> {{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]]"

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects B]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"

revision.comment: Bot: remove sole member from [[Category:Articles with Encyclopædia Britannica links]]
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
{{#if:{{{3|{{{author|}}}}}}|{{{3|{{{author}}}}}},{{sp}}|}}[https://www.britannica.com/EBchecked/topic/{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} {{{2|{{{title|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}] at the ''[[:en:Encyclopædia Britannica|Encyclopædia Britannica]]''{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACENUMBER}}|0||}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Britannica here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Britannica for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{#if:{{{3|{{{author|}}}}}}|{{{3|{{{author}}}}}},{{sp}}|}}[https://www.britannica.com/EBchecked/topic/{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} {{{2|{{{title|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}] at the ''[[:en:Encyclopædia Britannica|Encyclopædia Britannica]]''{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACENUMBER}}|0||}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
